name: roninforge-expo
description: Expo SDK 55 (React Native 0.83, React 19.2, New Architecture only, Expo Router 55, Reanimated 4 with react-native-worklets plugin, FlashList 2) Cursor plugin: 45+ anti-patterns, 10 rules, 5 skills, reviewer agent, correct + anti-pattern fixtures, validator. Catches the SDK 51-54 leftovers (Camera legacy export, NavigationContainer inside Router, useAnimatedGestureHandler, react-native-reanimated/plugin in babel, AsyncStorage for tokens, expo-cli, expo install, react-native-fast-image, expo-permissions, expo-av, FlashList v1 estimatedItemSize, expo-file-system classic API, newArchEnabled flag, react-native-vector-icons, react-native-fs) that pre-Oct-2024 LLMs still produce in an SDK 55 project.
